rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ah, thank goodness!
You were safe too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0020
rows.name:
When I came to, I was here,
and I was wondering what I should do, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I remembered the countermeasure my brother taught me a long time ago,
and decided to send up a flare and wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0040
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Oh, I'm sorry.
I ended up doing all the talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0050
rows.name:
It's not like everything is over yet,
but I felt a little relieved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0060
rows.name:
But leave it to me.
I can still fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33580100_MSG0070
rows.name: I will support you with everything I've got![ST:wait ]
